word: G456 - ἀνοικοδομέω - anoikodoméō - an-oy-kod-om-eh'-o - Build again

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνοικοδομέω

- Transliteration: Anoikodomeo

- Phonetic: an-oy-kod-om-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to build again

- Origin: from G303 and G3618

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and G3618; to rebuild: - build again.
